import React from 'react'; import './Contact.css'; const contactInfo = [ { icon: ( ), label: 'Phone (Oman)', value: '+968 9384 9873', href: 'tel:+96893849873', }, { icon: ( ), label: 'Email', value: 'mdaleem154@gmail.com', href: 'mailto:mdaleem154@gmail.com', }, { icon: ( ), label: 'Location', value: 'Madurantakam, Tamil Nadu', href: null, }, { icon: ( ), label: 'LinkedIn', value: 'mohammed-aleem-mba', href: 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohammed-aleem-mba-a9111a218/', }, { icon: ( ), label: 'Instagram', value: '@mohdaleem_offl', href: 'https://www.instagram.com/mohdaleem_offl', }, ]; export default function Contact() { return (
Get In Touch

Contact Me

Open to new opportunities, collaborations, and professional discussions. Feel free to reach out.

Let's Connect

Whether you have an opportunity, a question, or just want to say hello — my inbox is always open.

) : (
